privileged_info_summary: This task uses synthetically generated TB surveillance data (not real WHO data), despite the task description claiming to use 'WHO Tuberculosis Surveillance dataset'. The synthetic data includes 10 countries across 5 WHO regions (AFR, SEAR, WPR, AMR, EUR) for years 2010-2022. The AFR region contains 4 countries (Nigeria, South Africa, Kenya, Ethiopia) with realistic TB incidence rates. The task requires filtering to 24 rows (4 countries × 6 years: 2015-2020), creating 3 derived variables (TotalCases, IncidenceRate, IncidenceTier), and applying standard TB epidemiology calculations. The recode ranges for IncidenceTier are verified as: Low [0-50), Medium [50-150), High [150-300), Very High [300+). All metadata claims about regions, years, and calculations are consistent with the code implementation.
